name: python3-flaskext.wtf
title: python3-flaskext.wtf
summary: Simple integration of Flask and WTForms (Python 3)
description:
Simple integration of Flask and WTForms (Python 3)
Flask-WTF is an extension for Flask, providing a simple integration
of WTForms. It includes optional CSRF handling and Recaptcha support.
.
This is a Python 3 package
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-flaskext.wtf because Simple integration of Flask and WTForms (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-flaskext.wtf as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-flaskext.wtf with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-flaskext.wtf --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
